category_sources: Official FriCAS homepage says FriCAS is an advanced computer algebra system.
source_facts.description says Advanced computer algebra system.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use FriCAS.
docs_sources: Official FriCAS homepage links the official FriCAS Book, API, FAQ, help, examples, and installation guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/fricas/fricas, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes FriCAS as an advanced computer algebra system.
